name: Smoked Salmon Fillet Wrapped in Spinach
recipeIngredient: 4 Ounces Whole Spinach Leaves, Stalks Removed
1 Tablespoon Whole Pink Peppercorns In Brine, Rinsed, Drained And Crushed
recipeInstructions:
1. Blanch the spinach leaves and refresh in ice-cold water. Drain thoroughly.
2. Spread the cream cheese over the top of the fillet. Sprinkle with the crushed peppercorns.
3. Wrap the spinach leaves around the fillet until it is completely covered. Wrap tightly in clingfilm and chill well.
